attacking_style: Rarely initiates decisive attacks in modern observations; relies on positioning and covering moves rather than launching own accelerations. Most effective on gradual power climbs under 500m, not explosive surges.
team_tactics: Limited recent evidence of dedicated team support; appears to ride more independently, relying on personal positioning and chase ability rather than coordinated leadouts or tempo control.
terrain_preference: Moderate gradients and cobbled sectors suit his sustained power engine. Exposed on steep punchy climbs (Cauberg-type) and explosive gravel accelerations where pure wattage cannot compensate for declining acceleration.
vulnerability: Unable to respond to short, explosive attacks in decisive moments. Consistently positioned well but lacks finishing kick to close final gaps or counter-attack. Steep gradients (>8%) neutralize classics engine.
key_patterns: Consistently near front but cannot finish: multiple second places from chasing, not initiating.
Durability over explosiveness: 13 consecutive Roubaix finishes but declining competitiveness in decisive selections.
Gap-bridging ability degraded: unable to close moves on Kanarieberg and similar decisive moments.
Positioning remains strong but response to 500m surges on uphill finishes consistently inadequate.
form_trajectory: negative: Clear decline in ability to bridge gaps and respond to attacks (2022-2023) compared to earlier periods. Still durable but not competitive in winning positions.
